title: lithocarpus bacgiangensis
intro: Lithocarpus bacgiangensis, also known as Bac Giang Lithocarpus, is a plant species in the family Fagaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus bacgiangensis include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
